name: Pontiac Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Pontiac Bancorp, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Bank of Pontiac that provides various financial services to individuals and businesses in Livingston county, Grundy county, and their surrounding communities. The company accepts various deposit products, such as checking, savings, and money market accounts; and certificates of deposit. Its loan products include mortgage and consumer loans; commercial loans, including start-up, expansion, real estate acquisition, operating expense, debt consolidation, machinery/equipment, inventory, and short and long term business loans, as well as seasonal lines of credit; small business administration loans; and agricultural loans. The company also offers debit/ATM and credit cards; investment and trust solutions; and direct deposit, automatic funds transfer, ACH origination, bill pay, wire transfers, travelers checks, coin counting, notary, title transfers, safe deposit box, cash advance, guarantee, night depository, and online and mobile banking services. In addition, it provides mortgage life and disability, credit life, and accident and health insurance products. The company was founded in 1947 and is based in Pontiac, Illinois.
